/** Формирует промпт для генерации иллюстрации к секции теории */
function buildImagePrompt(topic: string, sectionTitle: string, domain: DomainType): string {
  const domainStyles: Record<DomainType, string> = {
    physics: 'scientific diagram, physics visualization, clean technical illustration',
    math: 'mathematical visualization, geometric shapes, clean diagram',
    chemistry: 'molecular structure, chemical diagram, laboratory illustration',
    programming: 'code architecture diagram, technology illustration, digital art',
    biology: 'biological illustration, cell diagram, nature visualization',
    history: 'historical illustration, vintage style, educational artwork',
    economics: 'business infographic, economic chart visualization, professional',
    languages: 'language learning illustration, cultural symbols, educational',
    psychology: 'brain visualization, cognitive diagram, human behavior illustration',
    law: 'legal concept illustration, justice symbols, professional diagram',
    medicine: 'medical illustration, anatomy diagram, healthcare visualization',
    art: 'artistic illustration, creative visualization, fine art style',
    general: 'educational illustration, clean infographic, professional diagram'
  }

  const style = domainStyles[domain] || domainStyles.general
  return `Educational illustration for "${sectionTitle}" in the topic "${topic}". Style: ${style}. Clean, modern, minimalist design with soft colors. No text or labels on the image.`
}
